# EmptyFlinkScalaKryoInstantiator

###

Related Doc: [package types](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.runtime.types.EmptyFlinkScalaKryoInstantiator> "Permalink")

####  class EmptyFlinkScalaKryoInstantiator extends KryoInstantiator

This class has a no-arg constructor, suitable for use with reflection instantiation It has no registered serializers, just the standard Kryo configured for Kryo.

Linear Supertypes

KryoInstantiator, Serializable, AnyRef, Any

Known Subclasses

[FlinkScalaKryoInstantiator](<FlinkScalaKryoInstantiator.html>)
